Frame before the gated layer in-point proves ordinary content is still absent before ip.
Frame at the gated layer in-point proves Lottie uses ip inclusively.
Frame at the gated layer out-point proves Lottie uses op exclusively.
Last root frame proves the background remains after the gated layer leaves.
